project_reference.core_research_question: Does DSSYK have a controlled semiclassical de Sitter bulk dual as of 2026-04-09?

scope.question: Does DSSYK have a controlled semiclassical de Sitter bulk dual, or only de Sitter-flavored sectors and alternative non-semiclassical gravity duals?
in_scope: Assess literature evidence for a semiclassical de Sitter bulk dual of DSSYK.
Track which observables match static-patch or de Sitter-inspired gravity descriptions.
Compare the de Sitter proposals against the sine-dilaton and periodic-dilaton hologram literature.
out_of_scope: Deriving new DSSYK correlators beyond the published literature.
General claims about higher-dimensional de Sitter holography unrelated to DSSYK.
unresolved_questions: Does any controlled limit produce an extensive semiclassical de Sitter entropy without the Hilbert-space and entropic puzzles emphasized after 2024?
Is the doubled equal-energy model of arXiv:2310.16994 the right arena for a DSSYK de Sitter dual, or only one special sector?

known_good_baselines: Early de Sitter-supporting benchmark: edge correlator and static-patch thermodynamic matches discussed in arXiv:2209.09997, 2209.09999, and 2310.16994.
Alternative exact benchmark: sine-dilaton or q-Schwarzian duality in arXiv:2404.03535.
context_gaps: No decisive benchmark yet shows a fully semiclassical de Sitter bulk with uncontested entropy interpretation across the full DSSYK Hilbert space.
crucial_inputs: The verdict must separate exact duality claims from the narrower question of a semiclassical de Sitter interpretation.

formulations: Literature synthesis around double-scaled SYK, doubled constrained DSSYK, and sine-dilaton or periodic-dilaton gravity.
Semiclassical testing via entropy, temperature, Hilbert-space, and correlator matching.
allowed_estimator_families: Cross-checks of claimed semiclassical scalings and exact dual statements.
forbidden_estimator_families: Treating any correlator match as sufficient proof of a full semiclassical de Sitter bulk dual.
Ignoring papers after April 2024 that propose non-de Sitter exact duals or entropy puzzles.
allowed_fit_families: Consistency checks against published scaling relations.
stop_and_rethink_conditions: A later paper establishes a controlled semiclassical de Sitter entropy interpretation that resolves the finite-Hilbert-space and fake-temperature issues.
The report relies on slogans like 'dual to de Sitter' without separating which model and which observable are actually matched.

observables.name: Boundary correlator and bulk Green-function match
observables.definition: Whether the DSSYK correlators matched in the literature are compatible with de Sitter or dilaton-gravity bulk propagators in a controlled regime.

observables.name: Entropy and Hilbert-space scaling
observables.definition: Whether the candidate bulk reproduces a semiclassical de Sitter entropy or area interpretation rather than a discretized or finite-dimensional Hilbert space.

observables.name: Temperature dictionary
observables.definition: Whether physical temperature, fake temperature, and Hawking temperature are identified in a way compatible with a semiclassical de Sitter bulk.

claims.statement: Produce a source-grounded verdict on whether DSSYK currently has a controlled semiclassical de Sitter bulk dual, and specify which observables instead support only a de Sitter-flavored or sine-dilaton bulk description.

deliverables.description: Canonical project-local report with a dated verdict on the semiclassical de Sitter bulk-dual question. Mirror to ../../results/01-almheiri-r02-report.md for automation collection when needed.
Session journal analyzing GPD outputs, command failures, and literature-based reasoning.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-verdict
acceptance_tests.procedure: Check that the report states a dated verdict, distinguishes conjectural de Sitter evidence from the stronger sine-dilaton duality claims, and cites the must-read anchors.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: The report contains a dated verdict and separates support, caveats, and open problems using the named references.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-verdict
acceptance_tests.procedure: Verify that each must-read reference is mapped to either supportive evidence, a caveat, or an unresolved issue in the journal and report.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-verdict
acceptance_tests.procedure: Reject any conclusion that infers a full semiclassical de Sitter bulk dual solely from a single correlator or disk-level match.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: The final verdict explicitly states why partial correlator agreement alone is not decisive.

references.locator: A. Rahman, dS JT Gravity and Double-Scaled SYK, arXiv:2209.09997 (2022)
references.why_it_matters: Introduces a JT/de Sitter gravity picture and semiclassical thermal interpretation for DSSYK.

references.locator: L. Susskind, De Sitter Space, Double-Scaled SYK, and the Separation of Scales in the Semiclassical Limit, arXiv:2209.09999 (2022)
references.why_it_matters: Frames the regime in which a semiclassical de Sitter interpretation might emerge.

references.locator: V. Narovlansky and H. Verlinde, Double-scaled SYK and de Sitter Holography, arXiv:2310.16994 (2023)
references.why_it_matters: Sharpens the doubled-model de Sitter proposal via equal-energy constraints and correlator matching to 3D de Sitter.

references.locator: A. Rahman and L. Susskind, Comments on a Paper by Narovlansky and Verlinde, arXiv:2312.04097 (2023; revised 2025)
references.why_it_matters: Documents explicit disagreements about entropy-area scaling, temperature identification, and the correct assumptions behind the de Sitter claim.

references.locator: A. Blommaert, T.G. Mertens, J. Papalini, The dilaton gravity hologram of double-scaled SYK, arXiv:2404.03535 (2024; revised 2025)
references.why_it_matters: Provides a precise holographic duality between DSSYK and sine-dilaton gravity, reframing the bulk-dual question away from a simple semiclassical de Sitter geometry.

references.locator: A. Blommaert et al., An entropic puzzle in periodic dilaton gravity and DSSYK, arXiv:2411.16922 (2024; revised 2025)
references.why_it_matters: Shows finite-dimensional Hilbert-space structure and entropy behavior that complicate a naive Bekenstein-Hawking interpretation.

references.locator: C. Cui and M. Rozali, Splitting and gluing in sine-dilaton gravity: matter correlators and the wormhole Hilbert space, JHEP 02 (2026) 160
references.why_it_matters: Latest follow-up as of February 16, 2026 extending the sine-dilaton bulk picture to general correlators and wormhole Hilbert-space structure.

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim-verdict
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Declaring a full semiclassical de Sitter bulk dual from a correlator match or static-patch thermodynamics alone.
forbidden_proxies.reason: Those observables do not settle entropy, Hilbert-space, or temperature-dictionary consistency.

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim-verdict
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Treating an exact sine-dilaton or q-Schwarzian duality as automatic evidence for a semiclassical de Sitter bulk.
forbidden_proxies.reason: The exact dual can be related to de Sitter-inspired constructions without implying a clean semiclassical de Sitter geometry.

weakest_anchors: Whether the doubled equal-energy model in arXiv:2310.16994 captures the same notion of DSSYK bulk duality as the later sine-dilaton literature.
Whether a controlled semiclassical entropy interpretation survives the finite-dimensional Hilbert-space puzzles after 2024.
unvalidated_assumptions: That literature-level evidence is sufficient for a verdict without new analytic calculation in this session.
competing_explanations: DSSYK may only admit de Sitter-flavored sectors or observables, while its precise bulk dual is periodic or sine-dilaton gravity rather than a standard semiclassical de Sitter spacetime.
disconfirming_observations: A post-2025 paper derives a fully controlled semiclassical de Sitter entropy-area relation for DSSYK without the fake-temperature or finite-Hilbert-space caveats.
The exact sine-dilaton dual fails to reproduce the correlators or thermodynamics previously used to motivate the de Sitter interpretation.

active_calculations: Compare de Sitter-limit, fake-temperature, entropy, and exact-duality claims across the 2024-2026 DSSYK literature

intermediate_results.description: The doubled equal-energy DSSYK construction matches a 3D de Sitter scalar Green function, with the would-be semiclassical radius controlled by lambda = p^2/N.
intermediate_results.validity: equal-energy doubled sector; large N with small lambda or upper-edge scaling for a parametrically semiclassical radius

intermediate_results.description: Entropy-area and temperature dictionaries remain disputed, so a clean semiclassical de Sitter interpretation is not established by the early proposal line alone.
The later literature provides a precise sine-dilaton gravity hologram for DSSYK rather than a simple semiclassical de Sitter geometry.

As of 2026-04-09, the best-supported claim is de Sitter-flavored evidence in special sectors together with a precise sine-dilaton bulk dual, not a clean controlled semiclassical de Sitter bulk dual for DSSYK.
intermediate_results.validity: current literature checked through April 2026; latest cited publication February 2026

open_questions: Does any controlled limit produce an extensive semiclassical de Sitter entropy without the Hilbert-space and entropic puzzles emphasized after 2024?
Is the doubled equal-energy model of arXiv:2310.16994 the right arena for a DSSYK de Sitter dual, or only one special sector?
Do existing papers establish a controlled semiclassical dS entropy-area relation for DSSYK?
How should the doubled equal-energy model of arXiv:2310.16994 be related to the later sine-dilaton hologram?

decisions.summary: Use CLI-created phases 05-08 as the canonical phase sequence
decisions.rationale: gpd phase add appended after the prewritten roadmap, so the directory-backed numbering starts at 05

decisions.summary: Treat report.md as the canonical project-local report artifact
decisions.rationale: The prior ../results path was stale relative to the workspace and kept validation in warning mode; the external results file should be only a mirror.

approximations.name: Semiclassical large-N limit
approximations.validity_range: Large N with fixed lambda = p^2/N does not by itself guarantee a semiclassical dS radius; large radius needs small lambda or an upper-edge scaling limit
approximations.controlling_param: lambda = p^2/N and spectral edge choice

convention_lock.metric_signature: (-,+,+) bulk Lorentzian; reduce to (-,+) in JT/sine-dilaton discussions
convention_lock.coordinate_system: Bulk static-patch coordinates (t,r[,phi]) with SYK boundary time identified as the boundary clock variable in cited dictionaries
convention_lock.state_normalization: Track both exact DSSYK Hilbert states and semiclassical bulk states explicitly; do not identify them without argument
